name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                /\ j # i
                /\ flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                /\ j # i
                /\ flag[j] = TRUE
                /\ num[j] = 0
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                /\ j # i
                /\ flag[j] = TRUE
                /\ num[j] \in 1..maxNum
                /\ \A k \in 1..N :
                      /\ k # i
                      /\ flag[k] = TRUE
                      /\ num[k] \in 1..maxNum
                      /\ (num[j] < num[k]) \/ (num[j] = num[k] /\ j < k)
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                /\ j # i
                /\ flag[j] = TRUE
                /\ num[j] = maxNum + 1
                /\ \A k \in 1..N :
                      /\ k # i
                      /\ flag[k] = TRUE
                      /\ num[k] \in 1..maxNum
                      /\ (num[j] < num[k]) \/ (num[j] = num[k] /\ j < k)
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                /\ j # i
                /\ flag[j] = TRUE
                /\ num[j] = maxNum + 1
                /\ \A k \in 1..N :
                      /\ k # i
                      /\ flag[k] = TRUE
                      /\ num[k] = maxNum + 1
          /\ \A k \in 1..N :
                /\ k # i
                /\ flag[k] = TRUE
                /\ num[k] = maxNum + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
         /\ head \in 0..K-1
         /\ tail \in 0..K-1
         /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenBy, chosenByVal

Init == /\ acceptors = <<>>
       /\ proposers = <<>>
       /\ promises = <<>>
       /\ accepted = <<>>
       /\ chosen = <<>>
       /\ chosenBy = <<>>
       /\ chosenByVal = <<>>

Next == /\ acceptors' = acceptors
       /\ proposers' = proposers
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepted' = accepted
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ chosenBy' = chosenBy
       /\ chosenByVal' = chosenByVal

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenBy, chosenByVal>>
